title: QCAlvaradoLab/FishColorAnalysis: MATLAB CODE for DNA methylation of the endothelin receptor B makes blue fish yellow.
author: Gail (GI) Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the MATLAB scripts used to quantify color and perform statistical analyses for the paper "DNA methylation of the endothelin receptor B makes blue fish yellow." 
 The scripts focus exclusively on quantifying and comparing body coloration across experimental groups. They implement workflows for color extraction, normalization, and statistical evaluation of similarity between pigmentation patterns. 
 These analyses were used to: 
 
 Extract color information from standardized fish images. 
 Compute color distribution metrics in multiple color spaces (RGB and HSV). 
 Compare phenotypic similarity across groups using chi-squared and correlation-based approaches. 
 Visualize relationships among individuals based on their quantified color profiles. 
 
 Requirements
MATLAB R2021b or later 
 Image Processing Toolbox
Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox 
 Citation
If you use this code, please cite:
Fang et al. (2025). DNA methylation of the endothelin receptor B makes blue fish yellow. Nature Communications.
